description: Air passenger departures from Singapore by destination country

notes.Myanmar: Not individually listed in CAAS dataset. Estimated from 'Other Countries In South East Asia' (539,846 total) based on typical SG-Myanmar flight volumes.
notes.Cambodia: Not individually listed in CAAS dataset. Estimated from 'Other Countries In South East Asia' (539,846 total) based on typical SG-Cambodia flight volumes.
notes.Other SEA breakdown: 539,846 total includes Myanmar (~150k), Cambodia (~250k), Brunei, Laos, Timor-Leste, etc.
